steps.title: Find the shared topic
steps.content: Text 1 says scientists still have a lot to learn about sloths and explains why studying them is difficult. Text 2 describes technology that helps scientists discover hidden sloth activities and correct misconceptions.

steps.title: Exclude one-text topics
steps.content: B is not discussed in either text. C appears only in Text 1, and D appears only in Text 2. They are not topics shared by both authors. The answer is A.
